headline: Victoria's Secret (VSCO) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift After Analysts Back Turnaround
summary: Victoria's Secret now carries a higher internal fair value estimate of US$89.20, up from US$65.56. This aligns with the cluster of Street price targets in roughly the US$75 to US$99 range. Recent analyst commentary points to this reset as a reflection of stronger earnings confidence around the turnaround, brand execution, and the current retail setup into 2026. In the sections that follow, you will see how this shifting price target narrative is developing and what to watch to stay on top of...
